headline: Citi Maintains Buy Rating on Republic Services (RSG)
summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) is one of the 10 Best Depressed Stocks to Buy in 2026. On May 12, 2026, Citi analyst Bryan Burgmeier lowered the firm’s price target on Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) to $247 from $253 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares following the company’s Q1 report. CIBC analyst Kevin Chiang […]
